problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
